title: Gierem Vanilla Plus: Client & Server Edition
description: Gierem’s custom Vanilla+ experience for a refined and enhanced Minecraft gameplay
body:
Gierem Vanilla+ is a polished Vanilla+ modpack that upgrades Minecraft while fully preserving the original gameplay experience.
No overhaul. No unnecessary complexity. Just Minecraft — but better.

It enhances exploration, visuals, performance, progression, and quality of life, creating a smoother and more immersive survival experience perfect for both solo worlds and multiplayer servers.

✨ Key Features

-    🧭 Expanded exploration with new structures and improved world generation
   
-    🎒 Better inventory management and storage systems
   
-    ⚔️ Equipment upgrades, accessories, and progression improvements
   
-    ✨ Enhanced enchantments and magic-related systems
   
-    🌌 Improved End dimension experience
   
-    🎨 Beautiful Vanilla+ graphics and visual upgrades
   
-    🛠️ Performance optimizations for smoother gameplay
   
-    📖 Cleaner UI and improved achievements scree
   
-    🛌 Sleeping bags and practical survival utilities
   

Every mod has been carefully selected, balanced, and tested to integrate naturally into vanilla mechanics, ensuring stability and long-term playability.

🧩 Compatibility

-    ✅ Client & Server compatible
For multiplayer, the same modpack must be installed on both client and server.
